getType() - Method in class de.weinzierlstefan.expressionparser.value.Value
Gets the type of the Value, possible types are Value.NUMBER, Value.STRING, Value.ARRAY, Value.TEMPORAL, Value.LONG, Value.DOUBLE, Value.BOOLEAN, Value.BIGDECIMAL, Value.CONTAINER and Value.NULL
